name: Beaver Meadow Golf Course
about: Beaver Meadow Golf Course is a city-owned and operated facility that combines traditional golf with modern simulator technology. The venue offers a full-service experience including an 18-hole golf course, comprehensive pro shop with PGA instruction, and dedicated indoor golf simulators. Located in Concord, NH, the course maintains a focus on both outdoor play and year-round indoor opportunities, making it suitable for golfers of all skill levels looking for a complete golfing experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Full-service pro shop with PGA Class A professional instruction available
Year-round golf simulator access for practice and league play
Combines traditional outdoor course play with modern indoor technology
Home to multiple simulator leagues with organized competition
Offers free lesson programs and 'Get Golf Ready' clinics

food_and_drink.notes: On-site restaurant service available (The Broken Tee Restaurant)
No information on alcohol service provided

simulator_hardware.notes: Multiple bays available but specific hardware brands not listed

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the venue offers club rentals and has equipment available for use in both the outdoor course and simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers on-site food service at The Broken Tee Restaurant, but outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator league information suggests regular play is possible, but specific time estimates for 18 holes are not provided.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Beaver Meadow offers junior programs, youth instruction, and family-oriented activities, making it suitable for younger golfers.
